pdf_metadata.title: MAIB Report 2/2019 - Unnamed rowing boat - Marine Incident
pdf_metadata.subject: MAIB report on the investigation of a failed throwing bag rescue line during a capsize drill on an unnamed rowing boat in Widnes, UK on 24 March 2018.
pdf_metadata.author: Marine Accident Investigation Branch
pdf_metadata.creator: Adobe InDesign CC 13.0 (Windows)
